# Canonical Structure V3.2
<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_golden_audit.py on 2026-07-08 -->
<!-- Source: golden_standard_structure_principles.yaml — do not edit manually -->

**Scope:** Multi-agent vibecoding projects (CC, GS, satellites).
**Operating principle:** No material fact lives only in chat; all unresolved work lives in `tasks/`.

---

## §1 Core Principle

> One function = one home. No bridges. No "someone." 100% agent-driven.
> If it is not in `tasks/`, it is not part of project state.

---

## §2 Directory Tree (CORE vs optional)

```
project/
├─ README.md              [CORE]  What / why / how to run
├─ SPEC.md                [CORE]  What the system IS (stable)
├─ HANDOFF.md             [CORE]  NOW / NEXT / BLOCKERS
├─ DECISIONS.md           [CORE]  Durable decisions only (NOT a log)
├─ STATE.md               [CORE for multi-track projects]
├─ .agents/AGENTS.md      [CORE]  Single governance hub (SP-001)
├─ tasks/backlog|active|blocked|review|done/  [CORE]  All work (SP-003/004)
├─ tasks/README.md        [CORE]  Task template (SP-007)
├─ audit/AUDIT_TRAIL.md   [CORE]  Append-only index
├─ audit/README.md        [CORE]  Session template (SP-007)
├─ audit/sessions/        [CORE]  One record per session (SP-005/009)
├─ scripts/audit.py       [CORE]  Structure enforcer (SP-006)
├─ src/ tests/ docs/      [CORE]  Code, tests, long-form docs
└─ knowledge/             (opt)   INDEX.md required if present (SP-010)
```

---

## §3 SP Enforcement Rules (10 entries)

| ID | Title | Status | Severity |
|---|---|---|---|
| `SP-001` | Single governance hub | `REMEDIATED` | `high` |
| `SP-002` | No material fact in chat | `DOC_ONLY` | `critical` |
| `SP-003` | Live debt only in backlog | `REMEDIATED` | `medium` |
| `SP-004` | Resolved debt goes to git log only | `REMEDIATED` | `medium` |
| `SP-005` | Session close is mandatory | `DOC_ONLY` | `high` |
| `SP-006` | Consistent structure across federated repos | `REMEDIATED` | `high` |
| `SP-007` | Templates mandatory for tasks and sessions | `REMEDIATED` | `medium` |
| `SP-008` | Agent self-certifies task completion | `DOC_ONLY` | `medium` |
| `SP-009` | Project knowledge must be canonicalized before session end | `REMEDIATED` | `high` |
| `SP-010` | Knowledge repo root discipline | `REMEDIATED` | `medium` |

### Detection (how audit.py enforces each rule)

| ID | Detection |
|---|---|
| `SP-001` | audit.py: assert no BOOTSTRAP.md, RULES.md, PERMISSIONS.md, DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md, or [agent].md files exist outside .agents/AGENTS.md |
| `SP-002` | audit.py: assert audit/sessions/ contains a record dated today; assert HANDOFF.md mtime matches today |
| `SP-003` | audit.py: assert tasks/done/ is empty (files moved there are deleted after commit) |
| `SP-004` | audit.py: assert no archive/ folder exists; assert tasks/done/ is empty |
| `SP-005` | audit.py: assert audit/sessions/ has a record for the current session; assert HANDOFF.md was updated |
| `SP-006` | audit.py: validate required folders and files exist; run across CC, GS, and registered satellites |
| `SP-007` | audit.py: assert tasks/README.md and audit/README.md exist; assert session files contain required sections |
| `SP-008` | — |
| `SP-009` | audit.py: assert audit/sessions/ has a record for current session; assert DECISIONS.md was updated if any architectural choice was made; assert tasks/backlog/ contains any newly discovered work items |
| `SP-010` | audit.py (knowledge-repo mode): assert root contains only *.yaml catalogs, generator script, README/SPEC/HANDOFF/DECISIONS/STATE, and dot-folders. Flag any .md or .json file at root that is not in the allowed list. |

---

## §4 Routing

| If it is… | Goes to |
|---|---|
| What the system IS | `SPEC.md` |
| Current baton | `HANDOFF.md` |
| Health across tracks | `STATE.md` |
| A durable decision (the why) | `DECISIONS.md` |
| Work to do / risk / cleanup | `tasks/backlog/` |
| In-flight / blocked / review | `tasks/active\|blocked\|review/` |
| Proof of what happened | `audit/sessions/` |
| Index of what happened | `audit/AUDIT_TRAIL.md` |
| Agent behavior | `.agents/AGENTS.md` |

---

## §5 Acceptance Test

A non-engineer must answer these five questions fast:

1. What is this project? → `README.md`
2. What is the system meant to be? → `SPEC.md`
3. What is happening now? → `HANDOFF.md`
4. What work is pending? → `tasks/backlog/`
5. What happened before? → `audit/AUDIT_TRAIL.md` + `audit/sessions/`

*GS canonical domain: [[Domains/CD18|CD18]] (Multi-Agent Project Governance).*
